case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. DAVE J MADOLE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-21-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF FLINT C. ZIDE RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST IN EXCESS OF 10% FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADOLE, DAVE J $1,066.97 PRINCIPAL, $325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $233.27 INTEREST, $298.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,923.74, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-21-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MADOLE, DAVE J DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-17-2008
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED NOV-23-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MADOLE, DAVE J
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $298.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MADOLE, DAVE J
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033 B(1)&(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF FLINT C. ZIDE RE: INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
